title: Implement /status resource handlers per LCI spec
description: Implement /status, /status/neighbors, /status/routes CoAP resources per LCI spec 17.5.3. GET returns current state as CBOR. /status and /status/neighbors support Observe (RFC 7641) for push notifications on change. Include RF stats, location, time, neighbor list with link quality, routing table.
acceptance_criteria: coap-client GET on /status/* returns valid CBOR; Observe on /status gets notifications on state change
close_reason: Implemented coap_status.c: GET /status, /status/neighbors, /status/routes with RFC 7641 Observe
